etymology.greek_root: mīmēma (μίμημα) = 'imitated thing', from mimeisthai 'to imitate', from mimos 'mime'

academic_foundations.memetics: Field studying self-replicating units of culture, emerged 1990s
core_concepts: memeplexes (co-adapted meme complexes): languages, traditions, religions, scientific theories
memes as selfish replicators with causal efficacy
viruses of the mind (Dawkins on religion)
cultural evolution faster than biological evolution
criticisms: discrete unit categorization of culture questioned

internet_memes.shift: Dawkins' abstract unit → concrete image macros, videos, copypastas
internet_memes.academic_study: Limbo (Mark Fisher), meme studies, digital anthropology
